name: Anderson Reporting
description: Offers legal videography, remote and in-person depositions, court reporting, realtime reporting, videoconferencing, and trial presentation services.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: ARS provides top notch court reporting and legal videography around Central Ohio and beyond!
Unbelievable handling of a last-minute video deposition. The great team at Anderson Reporting pulled a videographer and reporter out their hats and we
Great place to stage a video conference.

sentiment.summary: Offers legal videography, remote and in-person depositions, court reporting, realtime reporting, videoconferencing, and trial presentation services.

name: Higgins Court Reporting
description: State-of-the-art legal video services including video depositions, editing, courtroom playback, evidence videos, day-in-the-life videos, two-camera capability, transcript sync, internet streaming, and nationwide scheduling.

name: Kentuckiana Reporters
description: Provides court reporting and legal video deposition services with real-time reporting, daily transcripts, secure delivery, videography, and trial presentation; services Dayton and nationwide.

name: NAEGELI Deposition & Trial
description: Offers certified videographers for high-quality video recordings of depositions, hearings, and legal proceedings, along with court reporting, remote depositions, transcription, interpreting, and trial presentation.

name: Tackla Court Reporting
description: Provides videotaping services including two-camera setups like a mobile video studio for depositions in Northeast Ohio.

name: The Ohio Reporting Company
description: Maintains over 100 in-house videographers across the US for uniformly high-quality, edited, trial-ready legal videos; ensures consistent formatting and perpetual cloud storage.
